events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. Let's parse. Scenario: measurement record for Column/beam erection & plumb shows as-left reading inside posted limit. Gauge readable, setup stable, same value entered on inspection form. References AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. Task: evaluate field condition and return decision. Since reading within tolerance, gauge readable, stable setup, record matches, no defects. Decision pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80? Value? No numeric reading given; value can be 0 or null? Schema says value: 0. Since no numeric reading provided, keep 0. Sound_source empty string. Confidence high, maybe 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0. order empty. workable empty. findings empty. actions maybe none. rationale: as-left plumb reading within posted tolerance, gauge/setup/records acceptable per AISC 303/OSHA. references. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.
